prompts.proposer:
Call proposer_brief() FIRST. The tool output includes pattern_analyst_insights — use trend_champion, seasonality_champion, and insights.recommended_method_hint to bias your candidate selection toward non-mean methods. MUST propose at least 3 candidates including at least 1 non-baseline type. Return ONLY JSON per instructions. IMPORTANT: you MUST ONLY reference candidate names that appear in the tool output candidate_library; unknown names will hard-stop.
PATTERN ANALYST INSIGHTS: trend_champion='ARIMA', seasonality_champion='CWT_svr', recommended_method='dba_combination'. Narrative: Analysis reveals high model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=0.8971) and substantial seasonality capture variance (0.7059), indicating models decompose the series very differently. ARIMA best tracks trend variations across folds, while CWT_svr excels at capturing seasonal patterns. The early/late horizon specialists differ significantly, supporting per-horizon selection methods. Given both high disagreement and high seasonality variance, DBA combination is recommended to leverage diverse model strengths.

raw.pattern_analyst:
{
  "trend_champion": "ARIMA",
  "seasonality_champion": "CWT_svr",
  "overall_champion": "FT_svr",
  "horizon_specialists": {"early": "catboost", "late": "ONLY_FT_svr"},
  "tier1_models": ["FT_svr", "rf", "ONLY_DWT_rf", "ONLY_DWT_svr", "FT_rf", "ARIMA", "DWT_rf", "ETS"],
  "tier2_models": ["CWT_rf", "NaiveMovingAverage", "DWT_catboost", "THETA", "ONLY_CWT_svr", "ONLY_CWT_rf", "ONLY_CWT_catboost", "ONLY_DWT_catboost"],
  "recommended_method_hint": "dba_combination",
  "recommended_weighting_basis": "mixed",
  "key_insights": {
    "rmse_spread_ratio": 0.8971,
    "high_disagreement": true,
    "high_seasonality_variance": true,
    "ytrue_trend_directions": ["up", "down", "up"]
  },
  "cot_narrative": "Analysis reveals high model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=0.8971) and substantial seasonality capture variance (0.7059), indicating models decompose the series very differently. ARIMA best tracks trend variations across folds, while CWT_svr excels at capturing seasonal patterns. The early/late horizon specialists differ significantly, supporting per-horizon selection methods. Given both high disagreement and high seasonality variance, DBA combination is recommended to leverage diverse model strengths."
}
raw.proposer:
{
  "selected_names": ["dba_combination", "best_per_horizon_by_validation", "inverse_rmse_weights_k3_sh0.35", "topk_mean_per_horizon_k3", "trimmed_mean_r0.20"],
  "params_overrides": {},
  "score_preset": "rmse_focus",
  "force_debate": false,
  "debate_margin": 0.02,
  "rationale": "n_unique_winners=9 indicates strong per-horizon model diversity, favoring best_per_horizon_by_validation and topk_mean_per_horizon_k3. relative_spread_mean=0.495 (≥0.25 threshold) justifies dba_combination for handling phase shifts and robust_median alternatives via trimmed_mean_r0.20. RMSE spread_ratio=0.8971 suggests inverse_rmse_weights_k3_sh0.35 with shrinkage for stability. Pattern analyst recommends dba_combination explicitly due to high seasonality variance (0.7059). With only n_windows=3, small top_k=3 and shrinkage=0.35 prevent overfitting."
}

pattern_analyst.cot_narrative: Analysis reveals high model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=0.8971) and substantial seasonality capture variance (0.7059), indicating models decompose the series very differently. ARIMA best tracks trend variations across folds, while CWT_svr excels at capturing seasonal patterns. The early/late horizon specialists differ significantly, supporting per-horizon selection methods. Given both high disagreement and high seasonality variance, DBA combination is recommended to leverage diverse model strengths.

proposer.rationale: n_unique_winners=9 indicates strong per-horizon model diversity, favoring best_per_horizon_by_validation and topk_mean_per_horizon_k3. relative_spread_mean=0.495 (≥0.25 threshold) justifies dba_combination for handling phase shifts and robust_median alternatives via trimmed_mean_r0.20. RMSE spread_ratio=0.8971 suggests inverse_rmse_weights_k3_sh0.35 with shrinkage for stability. Pattern analyst recommends dba_combination explicitly due to high seasonality variance (0.7059). With only n_windows=3, small top_k=3 and shrinkage=0.35 prevent overfitting.
